item.title: Girl here: Neighbour was planning to assault me (fought back with all my might) He couldn't go further so he told everyone I must be a man, lol
item.description: As I told you before I reported him and he was not only being followed by the police and other agencies but also they were looking into his sexual predator and possible pedo history/records. They found evidence involving children including his own. His "wife" is thoroughly involved. I am not letting anyone destroy my life. Fucking psychopath misogynistic pedos are trash and they should go to jail. If you have been assaulted please speak up. Denounce You could be saving a life.
item.dc:creator: elleripley

item.title: Having a rough time lately
item.description: It's been happening with some increased frequency lately, her visits when I'm dreaming, and every time I wake up and in a frantic search for her, remember that she's gone. Make no mistake, the opportunities to see her again are great, but it's heart breaking at the same time, and I really just want someone to talk to about it, but it's such a stupid thing to be upset over.
item.dc:creator: WriteorWrong

item.title: I Painted This Today!
item.description: This is “Tree of Life” oil on a 20” x 30” canvas. The original and prints are here: www.etsy.com/shop/HaleyGrecoArtwork Thank you for viewing my art!

item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 786
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/cDfCKos Wholesome Post 785 https://imgur.com/gallery/LqZIBMw Wholesome Post 784 https://imgur.com/gallery/nZIsd6L Wholesome Post 783 https://imgur.com/gallery/pry6GYw Wholesome Post 782 https://imgur.com/gallery/9wxlevH Wholesome Post 781 https://imgur.com/gallery/0Hhfc60 Wholesome Post 780 https://imgur.com/gallery/My95sho Wholesome Post 779
I include a Gofundme link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.gofundme.com/f/k4nfwb-please-help-me-escape
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay# 9735) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48 (originally posted by @ryanjoseph666 on 2023-03-14 17:32:38)

item.dc:creator: Clever420Hobbit69

item.title: Olivia Munn has breast cancer and I don't care.
item.description: Don't get me wrong, it's sad no matter what. But at least it's someone who can afford it. Someone who can stop their entire life to deal with it. Someone who isn't going to be on the verge of bankruptcy because of it. Meanwhile there's millions of us who still go to work, still run our lives, don't have anyone to do the ugly parts for us. I don't have an assistant who can do my shopping and run my errands and fill out my paperwork. I have insurance that won't cover my meds. She can afford to pay out of pocket if she had too, which I'm sure she won't. The only reason I'm not homeless is because of a gofundme. And I'm mutilated. This is what cancer looks like. My body is destroyed and my finances are non-existent. I pay bills and that's it. My roommate and I counted change for groceries last week. Every day I get calls and letters from hospitals, credit card companies, utilities. It's sad that another human is sick. But at least it's a human who can take care of themselves. Maybe I'm just bitter. EDIT: I'm not mad at Olivia Munn. I'm mad that the system I live within does not support me. I'm mad that chances are good that her publicists are going to be posting pics of smiling-optimistic-thumbs-up-makeup-on pics of her thru treatment, and that's a lie. They're not going to show you her terrible scars. The puke. The diarrhea. The bruises. The surgery drains. The extreme weight changes. The piles and piles of pills. The pain. The tears. I feel for her and this awful thing she has to go through. Just want people to remember it's not that shiny. And we are struggling. And please DO NOT donate to the Komen foundation. Give that shit to the American cancer society or your local cancer charity. Or just put that shit in the hands of a cancer patient. My cashapp is $zeroisplural. Stand outside your local oncologists office and hand out twenties. Share my scars. Share your own scars. Tell your awful fuckin story. EDIT 2: To whoever dropped $69 in my cashapp: nice.
item.dc:creator: ZeroIsPlural

item.title: I found these memes pt. 5

Some things never change
Uh death queen of the night?
Someone is to blame and it's not me
Basically the big bang
That jimi Hendrix lighter from 11th grade..
Don't let no one get you down cause if they do ill be around

item.title: Trans Meme Mini-Dump
item.description:
Thorn is such goals. Like seriously, goth vampire aesthetic is always great, but she's on another level.
All of these characters inspired me on some level.
Yeah, I'm trans.
Don't know why I waited so long to go out and say it here. I do that a lot even with internet anonymity.
Video games help me so much, I can just play as a cool/cute/hot girl whenever I want. (also, femboy Kirito is best part of SAO)
In all seriousness, Link was designed to appear androgynous. Also, Link helped a friend of mine realize they were enby, and our conversations helped them realize they might be trans. So Link's cool.
I think this a lot.
Most of these are from elsewhere, but I think this was from Imgur?
That's a good edit.
Gotta have at least one for my trans masc bros. Will try to find more if I make another dump.
My sister is my biggest ally and took me clothes shopping shortly after I came out. But I was too afraid then.
My parents seemed a little confused at first, but they tried. Too bad I put my shell back up.
I just want some cute friends to give me a makeover and stuff.
Celeste is a good game, play it! Really gave me some gender euphoria.
All the time.
After years of going back in the closet, it was this meme that lead me to come back out and start actually doing something, and not give up again. Also, if I was AFAB I'd probably be a tomboy, idk.
Finnster coming out as genderfluid really inspired me too. The video is really cute, please watch it!
Ashley is inspiring to me too. She's really cute and makes helpful videos for trans women. Also, Tank is a chaser, lol.
Both of them are transition goals and relationship goals.
Seriously, after starting to follow Finnster, I find all these other awesome trans women. It's really helping me stay focused on my goals.
item.dc:creator: MermaidNinja

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i need this right now
apology accepted
how to get pulled over
as is tradition
what a nice group of folks here on imgur :)
disquieting
trade the pickle for a celery stalk
that cat does have management written all over it. upper management
my dog is named goon/goonie (i didn't name him)
makes a lot of sense
not sure why it's scottish but it's on the internet so it must be true
that's one fine looking barbecue pit
every school has/had one
classic case of the police breaking the law. sad
'i will return'
kinda weird - radiohead on mtvs beach house
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: This is Nacho the Oriental and he is a handsome boy :)
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: Goodbye BBY
item.description: 15 years of my life in the same store, worked from the bottom up and learned countless skills along the way. I really am going to miss the people who I worked with and my team, but I am so excited for my new adventures! I left an incredibly high volume, showroom floor, and high pressure store and now I own a Jewelry Store! My now partner was going to retire since his kids did not want to go in on the business with him, until I showed up. Now I get to learn all about the trade from someone who has been in the business for 40 years, plus I actually have time at home with the wife. No more 10-15 hour days, no more Black Friday, no more annual Physical Inventory. Off to new adventures!
item.dc:creator: sourpants17

item.title: I'm officially old
item.description: It's an Electrolux UltraOne Green, it's fucking incredible. I've used some cheap brandless vacuum for the last 10 years but it finally broke on me about a week ago. This new one is so silent and powerful in comparison it's crazy.
